name: HPCL ENERGIE BOBCARD

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, limited to 1 visit per quarter.

exclusions: fuel spends eligible for surcharge waiver do not earn reward points
HP Pay direct payment mode is not eligible for listed fuel savings
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: 2,000 joining reward points on spending Rs 5,000 or more within 60 days
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 50,000
additionalBenefits: 25% off up to Rs 100 on Paytm Movies on minimum 2 tickets per transaction
additionalDetails: The headline 5% fuel-savings framing combines 24 reward points per Rs 150 at HPCL with the 1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible HPCL fuel spends.
Fuel savings also apply on eligible LPG purchases and HP Pay QR fuel transactions; direct payment mode on HP Pay does not qualify.
HPCL additionally offers 1.5% cashback as Payback points on fuel purchases through the HP Pay app and a Rs 100 joining benefit on the first recharge of at least Rs 1,000.

salaried: Annual income of Rs 3.6 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of Rs 4.8 lakh or more

internalNotes: Audited against the official Bank of Baroda HPCL Energie product page on 2026-06-14.

The current official page confirms 24 reward points per Rs 150 on HPCL fuel spends, 10 reward points per Rs 150 on utilities, grocery, and departmental stores, 2 reward points per Rs 150 on other eligible spends, and 4 domestic lounge visits at 1 per quarter.
HP Pay direct payment mode is excluded from the QR-based fuel benefit wording on the official page.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
